nasb.text: For the waters of Nimrim are desolate. Surely the grass is withered, the tender grass died out, There is no green thing.

esv.text: the waters of Nimrim are a desolation; the grass is withered, the vegetation fails, the greenery is no more.

cnv.text: 因為寧林的眾水都已荒涼， 青草枯乾，嫩草滅沒， 完全沒有青綠之物。

ccb.text: 宁林的河道干涸， 青草枯萎，植被消失，毫无绿色。

csbs.text: 宁林的水涸竭， 青草枯干，嫩草绝迹， 青绿之物都没有了。
